programme.title: Green Eyed Killers
programme.desc: At the age of just 17, Christine Paolilla and her drug-addicted boyfriend took the lives of four people including two of her friends in a horrific, jealousy-fuelled attack, which became known as the Clear Lake Murders.

programme.title: Green Eyed Killers
programme.desc: The story of 24-year-old Alice, who was murdered by her ex after a terrifying campaign of stalking and harassment following the end of their brief relationship.

programme.title: Green Eyed Killers

programme.title: Green Eyed Killers

programme.title: Green Eyed Killers

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain
programme.desc: Doctor Harold Shipman was convicted of killing 15 patients in 2000, but he is thought to have killed up to 215. Discover how he was eventually caught by detectives.

programme.title: ITV Evening News
programme.desc: The latest headlines from around the world. Followed by a national weather forecast.

programme.title: The Martin Lewis Money Show Live
programme.desc: Consumer champion Martin Lewis continues his quest to save the British public a fortune by revealing more money-saving tips, budgeting advice and shopping secrets.

programme.title: Emmerdale
programme.desc: In the heart of the beautiful countryside of the Yorkshire Dales, residents of a farm and the nearby village deal with all the drama, joys and heartbreaks life throws at them.

programme.title: Coronation Street
programme.desc: The working-class residents of Coronation Street see their fair share of drama as they make their way about their daily lives.

programme.title: The Summit
programme.desc: The final four make the last terrifying ascent to The Summit and, as ever, there are obstacles in the way that include a dangerous crevasse crossing which sees one of them frozen in fear and anothers attempt made harder by the menacing Mountains Keeper - with their eyes on the prize, the four are tested physically and emotionally as they are forced to make a devastating decision at the last-ever vote-off, but the final ascent is put in jeopardy by bad weather.

programme.title: ITV News at Ten and Weather
programme.desc: Includes a national weather forecast and the latest news and weather in your region.

programme.title: ITV News London
programme.desc: The latest news in London and the South East, plus local weather.

programme.title: Who Wants to Be a Millionaire?
programme.desc: Jeremy Clarkson is on hand to ask the questions as we find out if any of the six contestants in this edition have the 15 correct answers they need to win one million pounds.

programme.title: Sorry, I Didnt Know
programme.desc: This edition sees Gina Yashere, Munya Chawawa, Peter Rethinasamy and Fiona Allen join the team leaders. Insightful, educational, bold, tongue-in-cheek and above all very funny, the teams will do battle over four rounds - from guessing why those unknown faces from history should be famous to uncovering a treasure trove of facts about Africa, this series is about educating as much as entertaining with a fabulous array of comedians from all backgrounds. Its history with a touch of colour...

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from home.

programme.title: Faked: Hunting My Online Predator
programme.desc: In this powerful true story, three women, strangers living hundreds of miles apart, are forced to take matters into their own hands after finding themselves portrayed as offering sexual services in faked profiles. This documentary for the BAFTA-winning ITV Exposure strand follows their five-year hunt for answers and for justice as the women unravel something far bigger than they could have imagined: a network of hundreds of unaware victims and one man at its heart.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal
programme.desc: Stephen Mulhern hosts as Kez gets her chance to open the iconic red boxes - she may be swayed by one of the Bankers tempting cash offers for her box or hold out for a shot at the 100,000-pound jackpot.

programme.desc: A daily escape designed to calm the mind and encourage relaxation and reflection.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex
programme.desc: Love is blossoming as the Essex couples go from strength to strength. Elma and Sammy enjoy a double date with Roman and Matilda and Dan and Ella take the next step by meeting his mum and nan for afternoon tea.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Miami
programme.desc: Alexia moves into her new apartment; Guerdy shaves her head in preparation for chemotherapy; Adriana hosts a release party for her new song with Emilio Estefan; Larsa and Guerdys ongoing feud explodes and forces Russell to step in and speak up.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Beverly Hills
programme.desc: Love is in the air for Boz and her new boyfriend, but Dorit and PK cant say the same.

programme.title: Ant and Decs Limitless Win
programme.desc: Theres truly life-changing money on offer as Ant and Dec try to help more contestants climb as high up the never-ending money ladder as they can - first up are husband-and-wife team Dan and Sarah who would like to buy their first home and build an animal sanctuary for their local community, but they must cash out with enough money to fulfil their dream or else risk crashing out and leaving with nothing. Its then the turn of married couple Nik and Khajals turn to take on the Limitless Ladder.

programme.title: Wheel of Fortune
programme.desc: Graham Norton invites nurse Chris, HR advisor Laura, and school administrator Samantha to spin the Wheel, solve puzzles and avoid bankrupts for a possible 50,000 pounds.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex
programme.desc: Part soap opera, part reality show, `The Only Way Is Essex follows the lives, loves and scandals of a group of real-life Essex guys and girls. Cameras capture the happenings at all kinds of locations including nail bars, nightclubs, and salons.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Cheshire
programme.desc: Nicole finally turns 50 and Joe and Seema plan a surprise party in her honour - however, friendships are fragile between the Housewives after Lauren stormed out at Paiges motherhood event and Joe must now round up the ladies for some fun while preventing the hoedown from becoming a showdown.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Miami
programme.desc: The Miami ladies reunite in dramatic fashion, and fashions, in New York City; Kiki confronts Larsa about her behaviour since dating Marcus; Adriana recites a poem dedicated to Alexia; Drug accusations and lies fracture Alexia and Larsas friendship.

programme.desc: The fangs are out at the Viper Room, where tensions are high between Kyle and Dorit; Bozoma navigates the next step in her fertility journey with her man by her side.

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: The story of everyday life in a small and tightly-knit community - this is the core of the worlds longest running primetime drama serial and the highest-rating programme in the UK. Its themes - love, passion, deception, greed and intrigue - are ones which everyone can relate to.

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: This episode looks at three daughters and their love for their mother. Eighty-year-old Rose has fluid on her lungs and is having trouble breathing. programme.title: Mafias Greatest Hits
programme.desc: Lifting the lid on notorious mobsters. Joe Colombo loved fame and money and took on the FBI in the 70s, with his Italian-American Civil Rights League campaigning against harassment.

programme.title: Mafias Greatest Hits
programme.desc: Ambitious John Gotti became the boss of the Gambino family by ordering the death of the groups former head and earned the nickname Teflon Don after three acquittals.

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: Larry Horn believed his alibi was perfect, but agents traced his calls and located the man he hired to kill his family.

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: The head of the Gambino crime family in New York assassinated his boss Paul Castellano to become the new don, but was eventually convicted by the FBI.

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: The Bureaus hunt for a police killer in Washington DC in 1995.

programme.title: Killing John F. Kennedy
programme.desc: Chronicling President John F. Kennedys life and career, and probing conspiracy theories surrounding his assassination in Dallas Nov. 22, 1963.

programme.title: Mafias Greatest Hits
programme.desc: Ex-FBI agent Joe Pistone, who infiltrated the Mafia for six years as mobster `Donnie Brasco, reveals how his undercover work led to over 100 convictions.

programme.title: Mafias Greatest Hits
programme.desc: Financier Allen Dorfman used union pension funds to bankroll the Mafia and the FBI quickly realised they could bankrupt the Mob by pursuing Dorfman.

programme.title: Mafias Greatest Hits
programme.desc: Joe Valachi was the first Mafia member to break the Mobs code of silence and turn public informer, revealing the term `Cosa Nostra to the world.

programme.title: Great Crimes and Trials
programme.desc: The death of Peppino Impastato in 1978 was dismissed by police as a random act. But he was an anti-Mafia activist. Were the people behind his death sheltered by the Mafia?

programme.title: FBI: Criminal Pursuit
programme.desc: Agent Mike Clarke starts a murder investigation that leads him to the Bronx.

programme.title: FBI: Criminal Pursuit
programme.desc: Mario Centobie has one goal, to make his ex-wife pay for putting him in prison. The FBI scrambles to find the fugitive, hoping they can stop him before he kills her.

programme.title: FBI: Criminal Pursuit
programme.desc: In the backwoods of Louisiana, Jesse James Caston shoots his wife and her best friend, kicking off a bloody rampage that will endanger his own stepdaughters, and put the FBI to the test.

programme.title: Mafias Greatest Hits
programme.desc: Gambino family soldier Roy DeMeo and his crew were suspected of killing dozens of people and dismembering their bodies, but the FBI and other mobsters were soon on his trail.

programme.title: The Krays: The Myth Behind the Legend
programme.desc: Rivals and other contemporaries discuss gangsters Ronnie and Reggie Kray, who ran Londons East End.

programme.title: Scarface: The Al Capone Story
programme.desc: In the Roaring Twenties, Al Capone ruled an empire of crime in the Windy City: gambling, prostitution, bootlegging, bribery, narcotics trafficking, robbery, protection rackets, and murder. It seemed that law enforcement couldnt touch him, until one fatal night in 1929.

programme.title: CIA Declassified
programme.desc: Discussing the remarkable tale of how the CIA tried to kill Fidel Castro by turning his 19-year-old lover into an assassin.

programme.title: CIA Declassified
programme.desc: In 1985, CIA director William Casey allegedly ordered the killing of a Lebanese cleric who he thought was the head of militant group Hezbollah.

programme.title: Who Killed JFK? The Conspiracies
programme.desc: John Fitzgerald Kennedys assassination is a memory etched onto the minds of most Americans. An exploration of the many theories that have arisen and sought to explain why the president was assassinated.

programme.title: The CEO Killer: Deny, Defend, Depose
programme.desc: Delving deep into the lives of Brian Thompson and Luigi Mangione, exploring their contrasting backgrounds, the events that drew them into each others orbit, and the shocking manifesto Mangione released that sent the internet into chaos.

programme.title: The Murder Network: A Serial Killer in Nazi Paris
programme.desc: In France, 1942, a serial killer stalks the streets of occupied Paris. Using the chaos of the war to his own advantage, psychotic doctor Marcel Petiot poses as a resistance operative and preys on those fleeing the nazis.

programme.title: The Boneyard
programme.desc: Chilling documentary charting a brutal real life tale of kidnapping, enslavement and murder. Find out how investigators tracked down a malicious murderer and explore the extensive trial that followed.

programme.title: FBI: Criminal Pursuit
programme.desc: Agent Mike Clarke starts a murder investigation that leads him to the Bronx.

programme.title: FBI: Criminal Pursuit
programme.desc: Mario Centobie has one goal, to make his ex-wife pay for putting him in prison. The FBI scrambles to find the fugitive, hoping they can stop him before he kills her.

programme.title: FBI: Criminal Pursuit
programme.desc: In the backwoods of Louisiana, Jesse James Caston shoots his wife and her best friend, kicking off a bloody rampage that will endanger his own stepdaughters, and put the FBI to the test.

programme.title: FBI: Criminal Pursuit
programme.desc: In the backwoods of Louisiana, Jesse James Caston shoots his wife and her best friend, kicking off a bloody rampage that will endanger his own stepdaughters, and put the FBI to the test.

programme.title: Mafias Greatest Hits
programme.desc: Gambino family soldier Roy DeMeo and his crew were suspected of killing dozens of people and dismembering their bodies, but the FBI and other mobsters were soon on his trail.

programme.title: Lions On The Move
programme.desc: Challenging two part documentary with Kevin Richardson. The team struggle to get the permits Several of the cats do not want to go into the van.

programme.title: Band of Bears
programme.desc: A journey of discovery in Scandinavias wild forests. Together with three brown bear cubs, visiting the home of the mighty moose and cunning wolves, rare forest reindeer and flying squirrels.

programme.title: Band of Bears
programme.desc: For months, the bear cubs remain close to their mother and are warmed and suckled, before the triplets begin to discover their world outside of the cave.

programme.title: Mantises: Living With Cannibals
programme.desc: Stealthy mantis hunts in Kaiserstuhl vineyards; mating season brings deadly survival challenges.

programme.title: Bear Essentials
programme.desc: We follow three young bears of different species - polar bears, brown bears and sloth bears (like Baloo, the Jungle Book Bear) - that inhabit dramatically varied landscapes as they find their way in the world. We look at how their mothers teach them the skills they need to survive and watch the many dangers they face.

programme.title: Animal Homes
programme.desc: Animals make use of brilliant and extraordinary specialist building skills to construct the perfect home.

programme.title: Antarctica Dreaming: Wildlife on Ice
programme.desc: Antarctica Dreaming documents all major Antarctic and sub-Antarctic animals.

programme.title: Blue Realm
programme.desc: Unlike other fish, giant manta rays are thought to be warm-blooded. Do they `heat their oversized brains?

programme.title: Blue Realm
programme.desc: Singing louder than any animal on earth, humpback whales are famous for their haunting songs and amazing acrobatics.

programme.title: Alpine Whistleblowers - On the Playground of the Marmots
programme.desc: These peculiar and roughly rabbit-sized rodents enjoy great popularity at the GroSSglockner in the Austrian Alps. Before the last ice age, marmots used to live in the lowland of Tirol, but with the melting of the glaciers they were driven higher up into the mountains - a trend that will continue given the current climate change.

programme.title: Little Killers
programme.desc: Meerkats hunt cooperatively in the Kalahari, with digging skills, compared to other small animal hunters.

programme.title: Adventure Earth: The Land Of Dams
programme.desc: North Rhine-Westphalia has many reservoirs that support wildlife and balance nature with development.

programme.title: Wild Baltic
programme.desc: The natural beauty of the shifting sand dunes of the Curonian Spit, the romantic beaches of the Latvian Baltic Sea and the island worlds of Estonia.

programme.title: Wild Baltic
programme.desc: The wide, often untouched wilderness of the Baltic hinterland is home to many animals. More than 35 brown bears live in the primeval forests of Alutaguse. In the spring, the Soomaa National Park transforms into a huge lake.

programme.title: Wild Moments
programme.desc: Features geckos, screech owls, penguins of warmer climates, and building a playground for squirrels.

programme.title: Wild Moments
programme.desc: Features geckos, screech owls, penguins of warmer climates, and building a playground for squirrels.

programme.title: Wild Moments: Funny Encounters

programme.desc: A man (Biff McGuire) struggles to remember the license plate number of the vehicle that killed his fiancee (Judith Ames).

programme.desc: Barry Cryer reflects on the life and career of multi-Emmy Award-winning comedian and actress Lily Tomlin.

programme.title: The Dark Tower
programme.desc: Roland Deschain, the last Gunslinger, must prevent the Man in Black from toppling the Dark Tower, the key that holds the universe together.

programme.title: Indiana Jones and the Kingdom of the Crystal Skull
programme.desc: Professor Henry Jones is given a coded message during the Cold War which leads him to Peru in search of a legendary skull. Jones needs to deliver the skull to its rightful place, but Soviet agents who are trailing Jones have other plans which will endanger the West if the artefact falls into their hands.

programme.title: Hounds of War
programme.desc: A mercenary seeks revenge after his entire team gets wiped out during a final mission.

programme.title: For a Few Dollars More
programme.desc: A band of cut-throats terrorising the Southwest has a sadistic leader who is being pursued by two bounty hunters. When the two offer to help the outlaws crack a stolen safe, the vicious leader is shot.

programme.title: The Brothers Grimm
programme.desc: Nineteenth-century con artists, Jake and Will Grimm, are caught up in a fairy-tale nightmare. They travel from village to village, pretending to protect the people from enchanted creatures and carrying out exorcisms. These skills are put to the test when they come across a genuine magical curse in a haunted forest.

programme.title: Jurassic World
programme.desc: Jurassic Park is now called Jurassic World, a fully functional dinosaur park that sees 20,000 visitors a year, the realisation of owner John Hammonds dreams. The scientists may have gone too far in creating some sort of hybrid dinosaur, which escapes and terrorises the park.

programme.title: Terminator Salvation
programme.desc: After the triumph of the machines on Judgement Day and with killer robots hunting down the last vestiges of humanity, resistance fighter John Connor battles back. However, the arrival of a mysterious stranger threatens to tip the balance in favour of the machines.

programme.title: The Fast and the Furious: Tokyo Drift
programme.desc: Street-racing sequel following an adrenaline-junkie automobile addict who narrowly avoids jail by agreeing to move in with his father in Tokyo. However, he soon discovers the thrill of the local underground drift racing scene and unwittingly becomes involved with the Yakuza.

programme.title: Uncharted
programme.desc: Treasure hunter Victor Sullivan recruits Nathan Drake to help him recover a 500-year-old fortune. What starts out as a heist becomes a globe-trotting, white-knuckle race to reach the prize before the ruthless Santiago Moncada can get his hands on it.

programme.title: Fast and Furious Presents: Hobbs and Shaw
programme.desc: Brixton Lorr is a cybernetically enhanced soldier who possesses superhuman strength, a brilliant mind and a lethal pathogen that could wipe out half of the worlds population. Its now up to hulking lawman Luke Hobbs and lawless operative Deckard Shaw to put aside their past differences and work together to prevent the seemingly indestructible Lorr from destroying humanity.

programme.title: Troy
programme.desc: When Trojan prince Paris woos Helen, Queen of Sparta, away from her husband Menelaus, the legendary warrior Achilles is called to lead the armies of Greece against the city fortress of Troy.

programme.title: Rampage
programme.desc: Primatologist Davis Okoye shares an unshakable bond with George, an extraordinarily intelligent silverback gorilla thats been in his care since birth. When a genetic experiment goes wrong, it causes George, a wolf and a reptile to grow to a monstrous size. As the mutated beasts embark on a path of destruction, Okoye teams up with a discredited genetic engineer and the military to secure an antidote and prevent a global catastrophe.

programme.title: Twister
programme.desc: Weather scientists Jo and Bill put marital problems aside to track a slew of devastating tornadoes raging through Oklahoma and stay one step ahead of their better-equipped but arrogant rivals. They have to get to the tornado first to be able to test a radical new device, by inserting it directly into the heart of the storm.

They have to get to the tornado first to be able to test a radical new device, by inserting it directly into the heart of the storm.

programme.title: Batman Unlimited: Monster Mayhem
programme.desc: The Dark Knight assembles his heroic friends like Green Arrow and Nightwing to stop the Joker and his cronies from unleashing a diabolical computer virus.

programme.title: Boonie Bears: Guardian Code
programme.desc: Briar and Bramble lose their mother at a very young age under mysterious circumstances. Many years later, logger Vick takes the bears to visit the Robot Research Institute, and they uncover a clue relating to their mother.

programme.title: Super-Charlie
programme.desc: A young boy attempts to solve an ongoing series of crimes with the help of his super-powered baby brother.

programme.title: Monster Family

programme.title: Despicable Me 4
programme.desc: Gru welcomes a new member to the family, Gru Jr., whos intent on tormenting his dad. However, their peaceful existence soon comes crashing down when criminal mastermind Maxime Le Mal escapes from prison and vows revenge against Gru.

programme.title: Turbo
programme.desc: A snail gets the chance to escape his slow-paced life and race in the Indianapolis 500 when a freak accident gives him the power of superspeed.

programme.title: Monsters vs Aliens
programme.desc: When an evil alien attacks the Earth, a motley crew of monsters is called into action to save the world from imminent destruction. A DreamWorks animation.

programme.title: Extinct
programme.desc: Op and Ed accidentally time-travel from the Galapagos Islands in 1835 to present-day Shanghai. They make their way through the city in confusion and make the horrifying discovery that the species to which they belong became extinct shortly after.

programme.title: Small Foot
programme.desc: Migo is a friendly Yeti who discovers something that he didnt know existed: a human. When his fellow villagers refuse to believe him, Migo embarks on an epic journey to find the mysterious creature that can put him back in good graces.

programme.title: Smurfs: The Lost Village
programme.desc: With the evil wizard Gargamel hot on their trail, Smurfette, Brainy, Clumsy and Hefty embark on a journey through the Forbidden Forest to find a mysterious village.

programme.title: Tim Burtons Corpse Bride
programme.desc: Anxious not to make a mistake in his wedding ceremony, Victor goes to the woods to practise his vows. Unfortunately, he slides the ring onto the twig-finger of a long-dead bride who has been waiting years for a suitor.

programme.title: The LEGO NINJAGO Movie
programme.desc: Master Wu, as wise-cracking as he is wise, leads a fierce team of secret ninja warriors to defeat the evil warlord Garmadon and save Ninjago City.

programme.desc: A snail gets the chance to escape his slow-paced life and race in the Indianapolis 500 when a freak accident gives him the power of superspeed.

programme.desc: Briar and Bramble lose their mother at a very young age under mysterious circumstances. Many years later, logger Vick takes the bears to visit the Robot Research Institute, and they uncover a clue relating to their mother.

programme.title: Rock Dog

programme.title: Rock Dog

programme.title: The Hangover Part III
programme.desc: Phil, Stu and Doug take Alan on a road trip to help him through a personal crisis.

programme.title: The School of Rock
programme.desc: After guitarist Dewey is kicked out of his own band, he pretends to be a teacher. When he hears the kids play, he realises they could be his support group in the Battle of the Bands, and hell finally get to be the rock star he knows hes destined to be.

programme.title: The Cinema List: Video Games
programme.desc: From pixelated beginnings to the big screen, we bring you your favourite games that made it to the movies - from `Sonic the Hedgehog 3 to `Street Fighter and more.

programme.title: Semi-Pro
programme.desc: One-hit wonder Jackie Moon uses the profits from his short-lived musical career to buy struggling American Basketball Association team the Flint Tropics and live out his dreams as coach and star player. However, when the ABA decide to merge with the NBA, only four of the ABAs teams can make the move into the more successful league.

programme.title: Friendship
programme.desc: A man tries to befriend his charismatic new neighbour, but it soon threatens to ruin both of their lives.

programme.title: Forces of Nature
programme.desc: A writer is trying to fly from New York to Savannah, Georgia, where he is due to be married in two days time. However, the plane crashes during take-off and the writer inadvertently saves the life of one of his fellow passengers, a free-spirited woman. She then accompanies him as he tries to continue his journey by rental car, train and bus - but he is beset by one disaster after another.

programme.title: American Pie 2
programme.desc: Action-packed sequel in which a group of friends are reunited after their freshman year of college and embark upon a series of comical adventures when they rent a summer house on Lake Michigan.

programme.title: Sex Tape
programme.desc: When Annie and Jay first met, they had an instant and intense romantic connection. However, 10 years and two children later, the flames of passion have dimmed to dull embers. To bring the spark back to their relationship, Annie and Jay decide to record themselves trying out every position in "The Joy of Sex." It seems like a great idea -- until they discover that their private recording has gone public via the Internet.

programme.title: The Wedding Singer
programme.desc: When one-time rock hopeful Robbie is jilted at the altar, he vents his bitterness in song, even when singing at other peoples weddings. Only true love can redeem the broken hearted songster but fortunately, hes about to meet a woman who will spin him right round (like a record).

programme.title: Beverly Hills Cop
programme.desc: A fast-talking cop trails his best friends killer from the alleys of Detroit to the posh galleries of Beverly Hills.

programme.title: Instant Family
programme.desc: When Pete and Ellie decide to start a family, they stumble into the world of foster care adoption. They hope to take in one small child, but when they meet three siblings, including a rebellious 15-year-old girl, they find themselves speeding from zero to three kids overnight. Now, Pete and Ellie must try to learn the ropes of instant parenthood in the hope of becoming a family.

programme.title: American Pie: The Wedding
programme.desc: Jim and Michelle are getting married and Jim struggles to win over his future in-laws and deal with his embarrassing dad. Meanwhile, Stifler isnt invited to the ceremony, but hes determined not to be left out.

programme.title: How to Lose a Guy in 10 Days
programme.desc: Andie Anderson writes an advice column for a fashionable magazine and agrees to demonstrate how easy it is to attract then alienate a man in just ten days. She chooses Benjamin Barry, little knowing hes an advertising executive whose job rests on proving he understands women so well that he can make one fall for him in two weeks.

programme.title: Miss Congeniality
programme.desc: An uncouth FBI agent goes undercover in the Miss United States beauty pageant as a contestant to flush out a terrorist who plans to bomb the event. The hard-nosed cop, who prides herself on her toughness, must discard her trainers and feminise her behaviour if she is to avoid blowing her cover.

programme.title: Miss Congeniality 2: Armed and Fabulous
programme.desc: FBI agent Gracie is given another makeover to become the face of the Bureau, prior to embarking on a promotional tour. When two of her friends are kidnapped - Miss USA and a beauty pageant director - she decides to investigate on her own, in defiance of orders to the contrary.

programme.title: Lost in Translation
programme.desc: In Tokyo shooting a whisky commercial, middle-aged actor Bob Harris becomes attracted to Charlotte, the young wife of a celebrity photographer. Together they ride out their boredom of hotel life and their bewilderment of the city.

programme.title: Parachute
programme.desc: After being released from rehab, Riley struggles to navigate the line between love and a new addiction.

programme.title: I Used to Be Funny
programme.desc: Comedian Sam struggles with PTSD, and considers joining the search for a missing teenage girl.

programme.title: Love Story
programme.desc: A wealthy law student and a lower-class music student meet and fall in love while at Harvard. In the face of parental disapproval, they marry and are blissfully happy, until they discover that she has a fatal disease.

programme.desc: Following a group of Los Angeles residents who try to find their way through the highs and lows of love during a single day.

programme.title: It Ends With Us
programme.desc: Lily Bloom falls for a charming neurosurgeon after she moves to Boston to chase her dream of opening her own business. However, when her first love suddenly reenters her life, her relationship gets upended, leaving her with an impossible choice.

programme.title: About a Boy
programme.desc: Parallel coming-of-age stories of a layabout `serial nice guy living a posh, carefree lifestyle off his deceased fathers fortune, and a bright but awkward youth whos tired of his mothers depressed, boyfriend-less state. Their paths collide when the boy fabricates a two-year-old son and joins a group called S.P.A.T. (Single Parents Alone Together).

programme.title: Parachute
programme.desc: After being released from rehab, Riley struggles to navigate the line between love and a new addiction.

programme.title: I, Tonya
programme.desc: In 1991, talented figure skater Tonya Harding becomes the first American woman to complete a triple axel during a competition. In 1994, her world comes crashing down when her ex-husband conspires to injure Nancy Kerrigan, a fellow Olympic hopeful, in a poorly conceived attack that forces the young woman to withdraw from the national championship. Hardings life and legacy instantly become tarnished as shes forever associated with one of the most infamous scandals in sports history.

programme.title: The Boy in the Striped Pyjamas
programme.desc: When his fathers job results in a family move to the countryside, young German boy Bruno misses his old friends. Roaming the grounds of the large country house he now calls home, he discovers the huge fenced facility that his dad Ralf, a Nazi officer, now manages. Approaching it, Bruno meets Shmuel, a fellow youngster on the other side of the barbed wire, wearing what appears to be a pair of pyjamas.

programme.title: Two Mules for Sister Sara
programme.desc: Whimsical but engaging western about a drifter who saves a woman from a gang of marauders. The cowboy is astonished to learn that the woman is a nun, especially when he witnesses her heavy drinking and cigar-smoking ways. The unlikely pair embark on a voyage of discovery as they become embroiled in the Mexican War.

programme.title: Love Story
programme.desc: A wealthy law student and a lower-class music student meet and fall in love while at Harvard. In the face of parental disapproval, they marry and are blissfully happy, until they discover that she has a fatal disease.

programme.title: No Escape
programme.desc: In Southeast Asia, a newly relocated American businessman and his family look for a safe haven during a violent political uprising.

programme.title: Paul Blart: Mall Cop 2
programme.desc: Paul Blart takes his teenage daughter with him to Las Vegas for a security-guard expo. While there, he stumbles upon a heist and must single-handedly apprehend the crooks.

programme.title: It Takes Two
programme.desc: When a foster child meets the daughter of a bazillionaire, they hatch a plan to solve the problems in their life, and switch identities.

programme.title: Peter Pan
programme.desc: In stifling Edwardian London, Wendy Darling mesmerises her brothers every night with bedtime tales of swordplay, swashbuckling and the fearsome Captain Hook. However, the children become the heroes of an even greater story, when Peter Pan flies into their nursery one night and leads them over moonlit rooftops through a galaxy of stars and to the lush jungles of Neverland.

programme.title: Pets on a Train
programme.desc: When a crew of animal bandits embark on a routine swindle, they find themselves caught up in a train heist. Its up to Falcon, a petty thief raccoon, and Rex, a righteous police-dog, to save the animals on this high-speed runway train.

programme.title: Super-Charlie
programme.desc: A young boy attempts to solve an ongoing series of crimes with the help of his super-powered baby brother.

programme.title: Penguins of Madagascar
programme.desc: The plucky penguins join a special inter-species task force in an attempt to stop an evil doctor from taking over the world.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: A magic portal transports the little blue people to Manhattan, where they must find a way back to their village before evil wizard Gargamel can find them.

programme.title: The Smurfs 2
programme.desc: Papa and the rest of the Smurfs reunite with their human friends to rescue Smurfette from the clutches of evil wizard Gargamel.

programme.title: Lemony Snickets A Series of Unfortunate Events
programme.desc: Three orphans are sent to live with their uncle Count Olaf, but he only wants their family fortune. What follows is a battle of wits.

programme.title: Pokemon Detective Pikachu
programme.desc: A young man joins forces with Detective Pikachu to unravel the mystery behind his fathers disappearance. Chasing clues through the streets of Ryme City, the dynamic duo soon discover a devious plot that poses a threat to the Pokemon universe.

programme.title: The BFG
programme.desc: A 10-year-old girl, Queen Victoria and the Big Friendly Giant must devise a plan to get rid of Bloodbottler, Fleshlumpeater and all the other bad giants once and for all.

programme.title: Spy Kids 2: The Island of Lost Dreams
programme.desc: The sequel in which the globetrotting sibling duo attempt to reclaim the powerful Transmooker device from the clutches of a mad scientist. Their quest leads them to his tropical island hideaway, which he shares with an assortment of mutant creatures.

programme.title: The Karate Kid
programme.desc: A new kid at a school makes the mistake of dating the ex-girlfriend of the school bully, whose gang then make his life a misery. He then bumps into a handyman who also happens to be a karate master. The handyman teaches him martial arts and he eventually meets up with his tormentors at a tournament, but will they fight fair?

programme.title: Pokemon Detective Pikachu
programme.desc: A young man joins forces with Detective Pikachu to unravel the mystery behind his fathers disappearance. Chasing clues through the streets of Ryme City, the dynamic duo soon discover a devious plot that poses a threat to the Pokemon universe.

programme.title: Pokemon Detective Pikachu
programme.desc: A young man joins forces with Detective Pikachu to unravel the mystery behind his fathers disappearance. Chasing clues through the streets of Ryme City, the dynamic duo soon discover a devious plot that poses a threat to the Pokemon universe.

programme.title: Fatal Attraction
programme.desc: A glamorous career woman loses control when her married lover, a Manhattan attorney, ends their brief affair. Unable to accept his rejection, she pursues him at the office, and then at his home, eventually drawing his wife and daughter into the confrontation.

programme.title: Demolition Man
programme.desc: Violence has been outlawed in the politically correct regime of 2032, and the only weapons in existence are consigned to a museum, but when an escaped psychopath heads straight for the museum, the authorities decide the only effective recourse they have is to thaw out a violent, cryogenically frozen cop.

programme.title: Shenandoah
programme.desc: A mans neutrality during the American Civil War is tested by his daughters marriage and his sons capture by Union forces.

programme.title: See No Evil, Hear No Evil
programme.desc: Lighthearted adventures of a pair of news vendors in New York - one deaf, one blind - who go on the run when they are blamed for the murder of a customer. Each has seen - or heard - just a whiff of a clue, and a frantic chase ensues as the duo struggle to clear their names.

programme.title: In and Out
programme.desc: The entire town is watching with bated breath as one of their own is up for an Oscar. They get more than they bargain for when he outs his high-school English teacher, who then has to prove to everyone, especially his fiancee, that hes straight. The press turn up and one reporter in particular is making life very difficult.

programme.title: Blazing Saddles
programme.desc: Irreverent spoof about a black sheriff hired by a crooked speculator to drive citizens out of an all-white town which lies in the path of a railroad. The townspeople turn on the inexperienced sheriff, and he is forced to turn to a convict, once the fastest gun in the West, for help.

programme.title: The Naked Gun: From the Files of Police Squad!
programme.desc: Hard-boiled incompetent cop Frank Drebin must stop the evil Vincent Ludwig from completing his diabolical plan of killing Elizabeth II.

programme.title: The Naked Gun 2 1/2: The Smell of Fear
programme.desc: Lt Frank Debrin uncovers a plot by the polluting energy giants to de-rail ecological plans that could render their products redundant. Theyre led by the evil Quentin Hapsburg who, to make matters worse, is romancing Franks ex, Jane Spencer.

programme.title: The Naked Gun 33 1/3: The Final Insult
programme.desc: Clueless cop Frank Drebin is hauled out of retirement to save the Oscars ceremony from mad bombers. Anna Nicole Smith provides support in this comic sequel.

programme.title: Singin in the Rain
programme.desc: When the transition is being made from silent films to `talkies, everyone has trouble adapting. Don and Lina have been cast repeatedly as a romantic couple, but when their latest film is remade into a musical, only Don has the voice for the new singing part. After a lot of practise with a diction coach, Lina still sounds terrible, and Kathy, a bright young aspiring actress, is hired to record over her voice.

programme.title: Shirley Valentine
programme.desc: Shirley is a Liverpudlian housewife stuck in a loveless marriage. One day she finds herself talking to the wall, and decides to make some changes in her life. Flying off to the Greek island of Mykonos on her own, she is gently romanced by middle-aged waiter Costas.

programme.title: Sleepless in Seattle
programme.desc: A recently engaged woman becomes obsessed with meeting the grieving widower she heard on a late night radio show. Sam, the widower, receives hundreds of letters following the radio phone-in which was instigated by his son Jonah.

programme.title: Youve Got Mail
programme.desc: Two rival bookstore owners are unaware that they are conducting a secret romance with each other on the Internet. When they discover the truth, they must prevent their business rivalry from interfering with their growing personal intimacy.

programme.title: In and Out
programme.desc: The entire town is watching with bated breath as one of their own is up for an Oscar. They get more than they bargain for when he outs his high-school English teacher, who then has to prove to everyone, especially his fiancee, that hes straight. The press turn up and one reporter in particular is making life very difficult.

programme.title: The Golden Child
programme.desc: A social worker who specialises in missing children is recruited to rescue a mystical Tibetan child from evil forces.

programme.title: Sky Cinema Preview
programme.desc: Previews of the great films now playing on Sky Cinema, plus other highlights showing on Sky.

programme.title: See No Evil, Hear No Evil
programme.desc: Lighthearted adventures of a pair of news vendors in New York - one deaf, one blind - who go on the run when they are blamed for the murder of a customer. Each has seen - or heard - just a whiff of a clue, and a frantic chase ensues as the duo struggle to clear their names.

programme.title: Billy Madison
programme.desc: Billy is the son of hotel chain magnate Brian Madison and expects to inherit the family fortune, but hes shocked when his father stipulates he wont unless he passes 12th grade in just 24 weeks. It will be tough, since he never passed 1st grade. Determined to prove his father wrong, Billy enrols at school.

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: An alcoholic millionaire is threatened with losing his inheritance if he does not marry the girl of his parents choosing. Despite his dislike for his prospective bride, he bows to the inevitable only to meet a light-fingered waitress who steals his heart. John Gielgud won an Oscar for his role as Arthurs loyal but outspoken valet.

programme.title: Singin in the Rain
programme.desc: When the transition is being made from silent films to `talkies, everyone has trouble adapting. Don and Lina have been cast repeatedly as a romantic couple, but when their latest film is remade into a musical, only Don has the voice for the new singing part. After a lot of practise with a diction coach, Lina still sounds terrible, and Kathy, a bright young aspiring actress, is hired to record over her voice.

programme.title: Sleepless in Seattle
programme.desc: A recently engaged woman becomes obsessed with meeting the grieving widower she heard on a late night radio show. Sam, the widower, receives hundreds of letters following the radio phone-in which was instigated by his son Jonah.

programme.title: Youve Got Mail
programme.desc: Two rival bookstore owners are unaware that they are conducting a secret romance with each other on the Internet. When they discover the truth, they must prevent their business rivalry from interfering with their growing personal intimacy.

programme.title: Big Daddy
programme.desc: A thirtysomething slacker attempts to inject some stability into his life by adopting an impressionable five-year-old.

programme.title: The Wedding Singer
programme.desc: When one-time rock hopeful Robbie is jilted at the altar, he vents his bitterness in song, even when singing at other peoples weddings. Only true love can redeem the broken hearted songster but fortunately, hes about to meet a woman who will spin him right round (like a record).

programme.title: Police Academy
programme.desc: Misfits realise their dreams of becoming cops when a mayoral decree forces the police academy to open its doors to all.

programme.title: Police Academy 2: Their First Assignment
programme.desc: Mahoney and friends have graduated from the Police Academy and are issued with their first assignments. As before, their cheerfulness and devotion to duty outweighs any shortcomings, but are they ready to do battle with a band of graffiti daubing terrorists?

programme.title: Police Academy 3: Back in Training
programme.desc: Slapstick farce with the incompetent cops as they set about saving their beloved academy from closure. Cutbacks mean that only one of the two police training schools can stay open, so Commandant Lassard appeals to the motley crew of graduates to come and train new recruits. However, the rival academy intends to sabotage their plans by cutting their training time down to a minimum.

programme.title: Pulp Fiction
programme.desc: A hit man falls for his bosss wife when he is asked to escort her on a date, a boxer reneges on his promise to throw a big fight, and a couple attempt a heist that rapidly escalates out of control.

programme.title: Sleepers
programme.desc: Eleven years after their horrific experiences at reform school, Tommy Marcano and John Reilly have become two-bit American gangsters, Lorenzo Carcaterra is a reporter and Michael Sullivan an assistant DA. The four are reunited when they chance across one of the abusive guards and take the chance for revenge.

programme.title: Beverly Hills Cop III
programme.desc: Axel Foley and his Beverly Hills buddies investigate criminal activities at a Southern California amusement park.

programme.title: Highway Patrol
programme.desc: More footage from Australia as we follow the men and women of the highways agencies as they patrol the countrys roads and freeways.

programme.title: Highway Patrol
programme.desc: More footage from Australia as we follow the men and women of the highways agencies as they patrol the countrys roads and freeways.

programme.title: Planet Weird
programme.desc: Watch the cannibalistic Portia spider devour the competition, uncover the bloodthirsty side of cuddly koalas and catch an epic giraffe battle.

programme.title: Cub Camp
programme.desc: Get to know Winston, a tiny abandoned cub who imprints on Judy as she nurses him 24-7. Feel the heartbreak as she severs their emotional attachment and teaches this sweet little fellow how to be a grown-up, independent bear in the non-human world.

programme.title: Cub Camp
programme.desc: Welcome sisters Xiba, Xyla, and Xola, a trio of starving orphans who turn Winstons world upside down before gentle Xola teaches him a lesson about friendship. Then monitor new cubs Yasmine and Yara, who get reacquainted after a stressful separation.

programme.title: Ol Pejeta Diaries
programme.desc: Two wild black rhinos fight to the death; a new ambassador for the black rhinos.

programme.title: Ol Pejeta Diaries
programme.desc: Ol Pejeta sits in the shadow of Mount Kenya, the second highest peak in Africa. It has one of the most beautiful sunrises in all of Africa.

programme.title: Monkey Life
programme.desc: The lives of monkeys, chimps, orangutans and apes at Monkey World Ape Rescue Centre.

programme.title: Monkey Life
programme.desc: The lives of monkeys, chimps, orangutans and apes at Monkey World Ape Rescue Centre.

programme.title: Great Parks of Africa
programme.sub-title: Chobe National Park: Land of Learning
programme.desc: In the north of Botswana there is a haven where the Chobe River provides a lifeline, but in the dry season many animals face a daily battle with the fierce heat, Including three of Africas most iconic families: lions, elephants and baboons.

programme.title: Orangutan Jungle School
programme.desc: The Jungle School team races to rescue a baby orangutan. Three-month-old Monita joins the other orphans at the school, including Alba, the worlds only known albino orangutan.

programme.title: Rooted
programme.desc: In the grasslands of southern Kalahari stands a 200 year old Acacia. In this arid landscape the Camelthorn is a sanctuary for big and small. Sociable weavers, Bruchid beetles and various mammals make use of this iconic tree.

programme.title: Malawi Wildlife Rescue
programme.desc: Dr Amandas team loses a pangolin abused by wildlife traffickers, but another is released post-rehab. Checking on a trio of hedgehogs and tag along as the centres baboons and nyala antelopes get a change of scenery.

programme.title: Deep Dive North America
programme.desc: Bundle up as Lizzie heads north to tag sharks and witness first-hand the slow, sobering disappearance of sea ice. Do time in bear jail with polar bears who are caught raiding a town for food after their icy hunting grounds diminish.

programme.title: Great Parks of Africa
programme.desc: In a park where land meets sea, the natural elements combine to create wonderful variety. Cola-colored water feeds forests green and dense. Fire and wind fuel growth in great diversity.

programme.title: Orangutan Jungle School
programme.desc: Dilla gives birth unexpectedly at midnight, but the delivery does not go smoothly. Plus, international celebrity, albino orangutan Alba, is released into the wild after rehabilitation.

programme.title: Rooted
programme.desc: The much-loved Sausage Tree stands in the Selinda Reserve in the north-eastern corner of Botswana, where it is dry and the rains are months away. Numerous birds and animals rely on the Sausage Tree for sustenance during this testing period.

programme.title: Malawi Wildlife Rescue
programme.desc: Dr Amanda attempts to collar a wild roan antelope. Later, she chase down a blue monkey while unrest ensues among the vervets. She examines an eagle owl with bumblefoot and says goodbye to Sheila the croc who isheaded back to the wild.

programme.title: Zambia Untamed
programme.desc: In the Luangwa Valley lies a grove of Ebony trees, home to a troop of baboons. But, there are dangers here as the resident leopard is powerful and agile enough to climb trees.

programme.title: Oldboy
programme.desc: Dae-Su is an obnoxious drunk bailed from the police station yet again by a friend. However, hes abducted from the street and wakes up in a cell, where he remains for the next 15 years, drugged unconscious when human contact is unavoidable, otherwise with only the television as company. And then, suddenly released, he is invited to track down his jailor with a denouement that is simply stunning.

programme.title: Most Haunted
programme.desc: The team head across the Atlantic and straight through the door of Whaley House aka `Americas Most Haunted House, in San Diego. It is built on the site of a public gallows that was the scene of many gruesome deaths.

programme.title: Most Haunted
programme.desc: The team visit Bodelwyddan Castle in Denbighshire. Amongst the fine art and antiquities, the `Most Haunted team discover that some former residents of this plush abode would rather not leave. After the warm Welsh welcome, prepare for a series of spine chilling events and things that go bump in the night.

programme.title: Most Haunted
programme.desc: The team investigate Annesley Hall. From style and splendour to danger and desolation - the `Most Haunted team are horrified by the sinister secrets that this manor house still harbours, having encountered both benevolent and belligerent spiritual entities. Their investigation culminates in an amazing phenomenon.

programme.desc: When Sheldon proves dismissive of Amys career accomplishments, Penny, Raj and Leonard try to make him realise that sometimes its beneficial to a relationship to pretend to care about things, even if you arent really that interested. Meanwhile, Howard notices that Bernadette cant stand being around children when the two of them perform a magic show at his nephews birthday party.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: In the 100th episode of the popular US sitcom, Leonard decides to ask Penny out on a date, and they both agree to give their relationship another chance. They argue over dinner and remember why things didnt work out between them in the first place, but end up sleeping together anyway. Later they agree to continue seeing each other secretly, on the condition that they act like friends when everyone else is around.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard and Penny decide to put their relationship through a `beta test, allowing them to report the problems they have with each other as `bugs.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: After Sheldon keeps Leonard awake all night, Leonard decides that he needs a break from Sheldons thankless demands and the roommate agreement is formally broken, ending the friendship between them.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon is forced to use up his two weeks of holiday time from work, so he goes to help Amy in her biology lab during his fortnight off.

programme.title: Edwardian Farm
programme.desc: It is February and the team approach the half way point in their year on the Edwardian Farm. To mark the occasion this episode explores one single day in a typical Edwardian farmers life. Incorporating a remarkable cache of letters written in the 1900s in a cottage at Morwhellham Quay, `A Day in the Life reveals the hidden stories of how ordinary rural Edwardians got by.

programme.title: Rick Steins Far Eastern Odyssey
programme.desc: Rick continues his odyssey in Thailand where he meets up with one of his heroes, David Thompson, a man who has immersed his professional life into understanding Thai cuisine. Finally he visits Melaka, once the heart of the spice trade, to enjoy the delights of Nyonya cuisine.

programme.title: Upstairs Downstairs
programme.sub-title: A Faraway Country About Which We Know Nothing
programme.desc: The enrapturing lives of those upstairs and downstairs in 165 Eaton Place are revisited. As 165 Eaton Place reopens its doors, two new arrivals make their mark. Whilst Sir Hallams forthright aunt Blanche disrupts life upstairs and feisty new maid Beryl struggles to adjust to life in service, Lady Agnes concern for her children reveals a dark secret about Mr Pritchard.

programme.title: Upstairs Downstairs
programme.sub-title: The Love That Pays the Price
programme.desc: Lady Agnes catches the eye of charismatic American millionaire Caspar Landry but, as she and Sir Hallam look to their future, a tragic turn of events leaves their promised dreams - and a close family member - in jeopardy. Meanwhile, downstairs, Mrs Thackeray makes a momentous decision, which throws the running of the house into chaos, and Blanche and Mr Amanjit continue to clash.

programme.title: Upstairs Downstairs
programme.desc: Blanche comes face to face with her former lover when a scandalous novel is published and, when the passion between the pair reignites, begins to consider a life away from Eaton Place. Downstairs, Beryls decision to take a stand causes serious ructions to the running of the house until a familiar face offers wise words.

programme.desc: Ives is keen to be a part of Fletchers gambling enterprise, something Mackay is determined to stop, so when Fletcher rejects Ives, things go terribly wrong for Fletcher - or do they?

programme.title: The Green Green Grass
programme.desc: Bored with life on the farm, Marlene throws herself into charity work. As a by-product of her efforts, Boycie senses an opportunity to become Sir Aubrey. Marlene, with the help of their staff, tries to use her charity contacts to help her husband achieve his dream. Unfortunately, life is very rarely that simple, particularly where Boycie and Marlene are concerned.

programme.desc: Staff that have reached a certain age have been made redundant, including Mrs Slocombe. Refusing to leave Grace Brothers, she becomes a cleaner and her position is filled by a younger woman.

programme.sub-title: Things to Do When Your Wife Runs Off With a Turkish Waiter

programme.title: Im Alan Partridge
programme.desc: Alan moves on from his TV chat show to Radio Norwich in the graveyard slot. First he has one final meeting with the BBC to see if he can return to television.

programme.title: Im Alan Partridge
programme.desc: After a nervous breakdown which saw him driving all the way to Dundee in his bare feet, Alan has managed to rebuild his life. He has usurped a coveted slot on Radio Norwich, much to the annoyance of fellow DJ Dave Clifton, and has a girlfriend, the oddball Ukrainian Sonia. He has also finally moved on from the Linton Travel Tavern -into a caravan.

programme.title: Men Behaving Badly
programme.desc: When three becomes a crowd, Gary is forced to choose between live-in lover Dorothy and live-in mate Tony. A painful decision, but not as painful as Tonys tattoo, which is intended to prove his love for Deborah.

programme.title: One Born Every Minute
programme.desc: This edition features two couples who have stuck together despite the challenges life has thrown at them. Ryan started dating Keely when they were both at school, but to their shock Keely fell pregnant very quickly. Katie says she is the grown up in the relationship and her fiance Steve is like a child. In the delivery suite, Steve is on form constantly mucking about and generally driving Katie up the wall.

programme.title: One Born Every Minute
programme.desc: Leah is having her sixth baby but unfortunately her partner is in prison and will miss the birth. Meanwhile, Becky met Police Sergeant John one Halloween when he was dressed as a witch and it was love at first sight. Within weeks they were engaged and trying for the child theyd both always wanted.

programme.title: Serial Killer with Piers Morgan
programme.desc: Alex Henriquez, a successful businessman from the Bronx in New York City, was convicted of killing three girls but claims he is an innocent man. The three victims had two things in common - they were all asphyxiated before being dumped by the highway, and they could all be placed with Alex Henriquez shortly before their deaths. For nearly 30 years, Henriquez has protested his innocence claiming the police set him up.

programme.title: Confessions of a Serial Killer with Piers Morgan
programme.desc: In Piers Morgans previous interviews with convicted serial killers, all protested their innocence. Now, for the first time, Piers comes face-face with a serial killer who is willing to admit to his heinous crimes. Over three months in late 1973, 20-year-old Bernard Giles picked up five innocent young women hitchhiking through his neighbourhood, and slaughtered each of them in cold blood. Fortunate to be spared the death penalty, he will never be released from prison.

programme.title: Villages by the Sea
programme.desc: Sitting on the east coast of Jersey, and about 14 miles from the coast of Normandy, the small village of Gorey was, for hundreds of years the frontline of defence between the British Isles and its enemy, the French.
